overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Pipeline health at a glance, computed live from your tracker.

empty.title: No applications yet
empty.hint: Run /apply <posting> or use + New application on the Applications page. Your KPIs and charts appear here once the tracker has rows.

fit.title: Fit distribution
fit.caption: Number of applications per fit-rating band

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: {count, plural, one {# company} other {# companies}} across your tracker.

empty.title: No companies yet
empty.hint: Companies are derived from the tracker. Add an application to populate this view.

companies.salaryLink: browse it on the Salary page

noSalary.title: No salary data
noSalary.hint: Add salary_data.json (or run a lookup on the Salary page) to enrich companies with benchmarks.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Read-only candidate profile, assembled from your skill files.

empty.title: No profile found
empty.hint: Run /setup to build your candidate profile (01–07 skill files). Once present, its sections render here read-only.

upskill.title: Upskill
upskill.description: Your upskill reports, plus a trigger to generate a new one.

empty.title: No upskill reports yet
empty.hint: Run /upskill (above) to generate a skills-gap report. New reports appear here once written to upskill/report-*.md.
